form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Posted a big 10m win as favourite at Enghien beating Maestro Cash in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 17 at $2.50. Two runs back 4th over 2450m at Caen, beaten 19m by Maximiliano De Lou in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 9 at $16. Likely to find this a bit tough.
